revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-455

A test in which lamps are operated under specified conditions for a specified time or to the end of life and during which photometric measurements may be made at specified intervals.

Reference: C.I.E.

{{IALAFooter}}
